records.ety: [L. superscribere, superscriptum; super over + scribere to write. See Super-, and Scribe.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Superscribed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Superscribing.]

defs: To write or engrave (a name, address, inscription, or the like) on the top or surface; to write a name, address, or the like, on the outside or cover of (anything); as, to superscribe a letter.
